name: separator
description: A thin divider with role=separator + aria-orientation (decorative=true drops it from the a11y tree). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the separator partial to your JTE root at lievit/separator.jte, reached as @template.lievit.separator(orientation=...). Pass decorative=true to hide it from assistive tech. The source is yours: edit freely.
